F

FALLBACK_INSERT - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
It will be fired when "CLSS_READ_ERROR" occurred
FALLBACK_MANUAL - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
Only take effect when manual input mode is supported.
FALLBACK_SWIPE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
Only take effect when swipe mode is supported.
FALLBACK_SWIPE_CHIP_NOT_ACCEPTED - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.CardEvent
Only take effect when swipe mode is supported.
FallbackInsertEntryFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Whether fallback insert is allowed after reading contactless card failed.
FallbackSwipeEntryFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Whether fallback swipe is allowed after reading EMV card failed.
FallbackToManualEntryFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Whether fallback to manual is allowed after reading swipe card failed.
feedPaper(int) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkBluetoothPrinter
 
FileName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The file name with the suffix.
FilePath - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The path of ".zip" file,
FileType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The file type indicates the file usage.
filterResponse(String) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
 
FINALIZE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType

Response FleetCard
FleetCard - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Response FleetCard

FleetOneAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FleetOneAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FleetOneCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FleetOneCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FleetPoNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Also called “Contract Number”.
FleetPoNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
Also called “Contract Number”.
FleetPoNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
Also called “Contract Number”.
FleetPromptCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Determines the prompts shown during manually entered Wright Express (WEX) card fleet transactions.
FleetPromptCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
Determines the prompts shown during manually entered Wright Express (WEX) card fleet transactions.
FleetwideAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FleetwideAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FleetwideCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FleetwideCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FolioNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo
The folio number.
FORCEAUTH - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
ForceCC - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Force terminal to do commercial transaction flag:
FORCED_ - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
FORCED_ISSUE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
FORCED_PREAUTH - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
ForceDuplicate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Duplicate transaction override flag, if this flag is set to ‘1’ the host will not check for duplicate, also it will override the local duplicate check.
ForceFsa - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Force terminal to do FSA transaction flag:
Fps - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
1 means the transaction amount less that Authorization limit and trans is offline approved.
FpsReceipt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
FPS Receipt mode, default as “Both merchant /customer copy”:
FpsSignature - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.TransInfo
1 means the transaction amount less that Signature limit and no signature on receipt needed.
FreightAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
Freight or shipping portion of the total transaction amount.
FRONT - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScanner.ScannerType
internal--front-facing camera
FrontCameraFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Not supported now
FuelAmt - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The portion of the transaction amount charged for fuel purchases during fleet transactions.
FuelmanAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FuelmanAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FuelmanCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
FuelmanCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
FULL_PAPER_CUT - Static variable in interface com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter.CutMode
Full paper cut
